findings.description: Subprocess call with non-static command: os.system
findings.recommendation: Ensure the executed command is safe and expected.

findings.description: Shell injection risk: os.system executes commands through shell
findings.recommendation: Use subprocess.run([...]) with shell=False for safer execution.

findings.description: Code injection risk: eval() allows arbitrary code execution
findings.recommendation: Avoid eval/exec. Use safer alternatives for dynamic behavior.
